subcodes.first_line: O fellow craftsman and companion in thought, give thanks unto God that thou art a servant of the friends and a humble attendant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هم پیشه و هم اندیشه این عبد آستان شکر کن خدا را که خادم یارانی و چاکر
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
